title: Prose
description: Continuous, mathematically contiguous paragraphs driving a linear sequence or argument

title: Verse
description: Text physically separated into line-broken meters, rhythms, or stanzas

title: Script
description: Text geometrically bound to explicit character speaker tags and distinct stage directions

title: Transcript
description: Iterative speaker tags mathematically abandoning narrative framing or scene staging

title: Epistolary
description: Discrete, dated, or indexed fragments simulating autonomous logs or diary entries

title: Schematic
description: Structurally discontinuous arrangement relying aggressively on hierarchical headers, raw data, or bulleted components to fracture linear reading
